response.global_analysis: Video features dialogue and a freestyle rap by Gigi Murin in a 3D environment. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal audio. On-screen text was used to confirm the 'intended' dialogue for the Grem NPCs who speak in gibberish. The rap segment was transcribed directly from audio as no reference lyrics were provided in the JSON. Character limits (50 chars) and audio pauses are respected by splitting blocks. Contiguous timestamps are used for split sentences to ensure seamless display.
